title: Bottom bar: brand status metrics card

direction.note: Reuse themes.css tokens + the existing MobileBottomBar component set; monotone, active = weight not color.

versions.summary: Final: faithful AS-IS / TO-BE (green = new, yellow = changed) plus the data-zero empty state, monotone.
decisions: card sits above the existing nav, inside the sheet — current nav untouched

decisions.q: Where does the metrics card sit?
decisions.choice: above the existing nav, inside the sheet
decisions.why: keeps the current bottom nav untouched (the keep-requirement)
matches the real component: active = font-bold text-foreground, not blue
